package rulefixtures

import (
	"os"
)

// scenario for rows_without_close: Query result handles that appear locally owned but have no observed rows.Close() call.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: idioms; severity: info.
func scenario394Positive(paths []string) error {
	for _, path := range paths {
		file, err := os.Open(path)
		if err != nil { return err }
		defer file.Close()
	}
	return nil
}
